parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Cost per enrolled person-year, linking incremental spending to enrollment

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Health-channel parameter representing proportional mortality effect per enrolled person

programs.comments: This program uses the accounting identity deltaN = deltaB / c to convert incremental spending to enrollment, then applies a proportional mortality effect dilution beta = (deltaN / N_pop) * kappa.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Average incremental cost per Medicaid+CHIP enrollee per year

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Unitless parameter capturing mortality reduction effect per enrolled individual

programs.comments: Equivalent to the first program but emphasizing enrollment as the primary mediator; beta is proportional to enrollment fraction times kappa, with spending converted to enrollment via c.
